inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the substance undergoing temperature change in kilograms

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity at constant pressure for the substance in kilojoules per kilogram per Kelvin

inputs.label: Initial Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Starting temperature of the substance in degrees Celsius

inputs.label: Final Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ending temperature of the substance in degrees Celsius
